title: PlainCloak v1 test-vector file
description: Schema that every file in test-vectors/v1/deterministic/ and test-vectors/v1/verification/ MUST conform to. The category-specific shape of inputs and expected is described in the file's own README and in the relevant spec section.

spec_references.description: Section paths in the spec that this file exercises, e.g. ['spec/v1/04-encoding.md#4.2'].

expected.description: Category-specific expected output fields. For verification vectors, includes 'outcome' which MUST be one of the five outcomes of spec/v1/10-encrypt-decrypt.md Section 10.3.

skip_reason.description: If present, implementations MAY skip this case. Used during draft phases where a case is documented but not yet stable.
